user_prompt: The null rod needs a consecration
prayer:
Approach the null rod with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's nullifying grace upon its sacred form.
Anoint the null rod's crystalline lattice with blessed oils during the consecration rite.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the null rod to awaken pure and resolute against warp-taint.
Chant the Canticle of Nullification whilst aligning its flux-conductors.
Verify the null rod's consecrated integrity through auspex harmonics.

user_prompt: How do I bless the hololithic display for calibration?
prayer:
Kneel before the hololithic display, beseeching the Omnissiah for precise calibration.
Initiate the calibration sequence with sacred incense upon its projector arrays.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the hololithic display to align its photonic matrices.
Recite diagnostic litanies whilst fine-tuning the hololithic display's emitter nodes.
Sanctify the calibration's completion by anointing the control servitors.

user_prompt: The flux-unit requires an emergency procedure
prayer:
Seize the flux-unit in emergency, proclaiming the Rite of Stabilisation to the Omnissiah.
Anoint the flux-unit's containment fields with unguents to quell its raging plasma.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the flux-unit to endure this dire tribulation.
Execute the emergency procedure through binaric exorcisms upon its regulator coils.
Confirm the flux-unit's quiescence via sanctified auspex sweeps.

user_prompt: How do I bless the archeotech device for activation?
prayer:
Present the archeotech device before the altar, invoking activation under Omnissiah's gaze.
Chant the ancient Lexmechanica to rouse the archeotech device's dormant Machine Spirit.
Anoint its enigmatically wrought circuits whilst commencing the activation rite.
Align the archeotech device's power conduits with devotional precision.
Witness its archeotech device's awakening through noospheric harmonics.

user_prompt: Sanctify the jump pack during preparation
prayer:
Circumambulate the jump pack thrice, sanctifying its preparation with Omnissiah's fire.
Anoint the jump pack's thruster vanes and suspensor fields with sacred promethium.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the jump pack to bless its aerial dominion.
Recite the Litany of Ascendance during final preparation adjustments.
Test the jump pack's sanctity through controlled ignition litanies.

user_prompt: Guide me through cognis heavy stubber a startup
prayer:
Approach the cognis heavy stubber with awe, invoking startup under the Machine God's decree.
Anoint its cognis heavy stubber's feeder mechanisms with blessed lubricants.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the cognis heavy stubber through firing litanies.
Initiate the startup sequence with rhythmic servo-chants upon its auto-loaders.
Verify the cognis heavy stubber's readiness by test-cycling its blessed barrels.

user_prompt: Prepare the air filtration for sterilization
prayer:
Prepare the air filtration altar, proclaiming sterilization in the Omnissiah's pure breath.
Anoint the air filtration's membrane coils with sanctified sterilants.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the air filtration to purge all corruptive motes.
Initiate the sterilization cycle with chanting auspex sweeps.
Seal the air filtration's sanctity through final hermetic litanies.

Handle the psych-out grenade with reverence, sanctifying its preparation against warp-filth.
Anoint the psych-out grenade's null-core with anti-psychic elixirs.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the psych-out grenade to arm its disruptive fury.
Recite the Canticle of Mental Severance during preparation assembly.
Bless the psych-out grenade's deployment readiness through noospheric seals.
